Extract mark-recapture tags

Source: R/tags.R
get_ctags.Rd

get_ctags() extracts conventional mark-recapture tags from an object that directly contains tagging data or from an object with a tags element.

Usage

get_ctags(x)

Arguments

x

An admove_tags object, a data frame with a tag_type column, or an object containing a tags element.

Value

A subset of the input tagging data containing only mark-recapture tags (tag_type == "c").

On this page
